text: Lord, quiet my heart and draw me close to you right now.
Father, thank you that your peace is always available to me. I receive it now.
Jesus, I pause to remember you are with me. Guide my steps today.
Lord, I give you this moment. Let it be yours.
God, you are my refuge. I rest in you right now.
Father, fill this pause with your presence. I am yours.
Lord Jesus, let your peace guard my heart and mind this moment.
Heavenly Father, I breathe out distraction and breathe in your peace.
God, thank you that I am never alone. You are here with me now.
Lord, I surrender this moment to you. Do what only you can do.
Father, tune my heart to yours right now. I am listening.
Jesus, be my focus. You are more than enough.
Lord, I come to you just as I am. Thank you for your grace.
Father, let your love be the loudest voice in my heart today.
God, I rest in the knowledge that you hold everything I need.
Lord, help me be still and know that you are God.
Jesus, my soul finds rest in you alone. I receive your peace now.
Father, I trust that your plans for me are good. Lead me.
Lord, let this moment become an offering of my heart to you.
God, thank you for never leaving me. I am held by your love.
Father, I pause here. Whatever I was reaching for — remind me that you are enough.
Lord, still my restless heart. Let me breathe before I scroll.
Jesus, hold my attention for a moment. I give you this pause.
God, you see where my heart just went. Bring it back to you.
Father, be the first thing I reach for today.
Lord, let this moment of stillness be an act of trust.
Jesus, I give you this distracted mind. Make it yours.
God, the world keeps pulling at me. Hold me fast.
Father, I am weary of the noise. You are my quiet place.
Lord, you know what I was looking for. Show me that you are better.
Jesus, let me linger here with you a moment longer.
God, help me want you more than I want to be entertained.
Father, my hands keep reaching for the wrong things. Guide them.
Lord, before I go any further — I come to you first.
Jesus, let the next minute be yours, not the feed's.
God, I am made for more than this. Remind me.
Father, thank you for interrupting me. You know what I need.
Lord, there is a restlessness in me. Only you can satisfy it.
Jesus, I pause and breathe. You are here. That is enough.
God, anchor my soul in something that lasts.
Father, I release my grip on the screen and open my hands to you.
Lord, redirect this energy toward what is true and good and lasting.
Jesus, I am easily distracted. Be my one fixed point.
God, let me see clearly what I am trading my attention for.
Father, calm the noise inside me before it grows louder.
Lord, I have everything I need in you. Help me live like I believe that.
Jesus, this impulse to scroll — I lay it down before you.
God, you are more interesting than anything on this screen.
Father, let me carry your peace through the rest of this day.
Lord, help me close this and go do what actually matters.
Jesus, I trust you with this moment and the one that follows.
God, the world says fill the silence. You say be still. I choose you.
Father, my soul is thirsty. Point me to the living water.
Lord, I want to abide, not just appear.
Jesus, thank you for not letting me rush past you today.
God, fill the empty place I was about to fill with distraction.
Father, you have been patient with me. I want to be patient with you.
Lord, let what I carry out of this moment be yours, not the world's.
Jesus, I am reaching for something. Let it be you.
God, slow me down. I do not want to miss what you are doing.
